threat_model.name: Insider Threat Detection Model
threat_model.description: Comprehensive insider threat detection using UEBA behavioral analytics

risk_indicators.name: Abnormal Data Access Volume
risk_indicators.description: User accessing significantly more files than department peers

risk_indicators.name: Off-Hours Activity
risk_indicators.description: Activity outside user's normal working hours

risk_indicators.name: Impossible Travel
risk_indicators.description: Login from geographically distant location within impossible timeframe

risk_indicators.name: USB Data Transfer
risk_indicators.description: Large data transfer to removable media

risk_indicators.name: Personal Email Forwarding
risk_indicators.description: Forwarding corporate data to personal email accounts

risk_indicators.name: Cloud Upload Anomaly
risk_indicators.description: Abnormal volume of uploads to cloud storage

risk_indicators.name: First-Time Resource Access
risk_indicators.description: User accessing resources never accessed before

risk_indicators.name: HR Risk Flag
risk_indicators.description: User flagged by HR for departure or performance issues
